flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Tarleton State University rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.8k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Tarleton State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (29.7% → 33.0%).
